job_description:
# Clinical Data Analyst
Company: Pager Health
Source: Built In
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted/Reposted: April 18, 2026
URL: https://builtin.com/job/clinical-data-analyst/8829683

## Highlights
- Remote US healthtech role focused on payer-grade outcomes analytics.
- Integrates claims, clinical, engagement, eligibility, risk scores, care management/case notes, vendor feeds, and navigation engagement signals.
- Requires advanced SQL plus Python or R, BI/dashboarding, healthcare analytics, medical economics/public health/statistics, and data quality governance.
- Focus areas include utilization, site-of-care impact, population stratification, HEDIS-like measures, engagement funnels, and client-facing methodology.
strengths: Strong healthcare/payer analytics, claims, eligibility, SQL, BI/reporting, and data quality alignment.
Remote healthtech role with direct claims and clinical data integration.
Measurement governance and data quality language maps well to ETL validation and reporting reliability experience.
gaps: Role asks for 10+ years and medical economics/outcomes evaluation depth; base resume is closer to 7+ years and ETL/data quality.
Python/R and quasi-experimental design should not be overstated.
notes: Apply if comfortable with a senior stretch. Tailor toward payer claims/eligibility data, SQL, reporting validation, data quality governance, and stakeholder-ready healthcare insights.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | Claims Analytics | SQL Data Quality
